prompt_packages.prompt_text: Colored manhwa/webtoon comic-style illustration, semi-realistic anime proportions, clean medium-weight linework, flat cel-shading with soft gradients, vibrant saturated colors. Extreme close-up on a young man's face abruptly waking up in pitch darkness, eyes wide open in shock, gasping for breath as if surfacing from deep water. He wears modern earthly pajamas, has bright blue eyes and black hair with a faint purple sheen tied in a messy bun. Dim, almost absent lighting — only the contour of his face visible against black. No visible background details.
